3.gloss: you will be able to do justice

24.gloss: And (prohibited are) the ones who are married

49.gloss: (even as much as) a hair on a date-seed

53.gloss: (even as much as the) speck on a date seed

68.gloss: And We would have guided them

77.gloss: (even as much as) a hair on a date-seed

90.gloss: surely He (would have) given them power
and surely they (would have) fought you

119.gloss: And I will surely mislead them
and surely arouse desires in them
and surely I will order them
so they will surely cut off
and surely I will order them

124.gloss: (even as much as) the speck on a date-seed

127.gloss: and the ones who are weak

172.gloss: the ones who are near (to Allah)

173.gloss: then He will give them in full
